entries.definition:
j–l–b–b a cover-all garment worn particularly by women, to put on such a garment; headscarf, veil covering the head and chest, night garment. Of this root, جَلَابِيب jalābīb occurs once in the Qurʾan.
جَلَابِيب jalābīb [pl. of n. جِلْبَاب jilbāb] either an outer garment covering the whole body or a large veil covering the head down to the waist (33:59) يُدْنِينَ عَلَيْهِنَّ مِنْ جَلَابِيبِهِنَّ to draw their garments over them.

Jālūt (see alphabetically).

جَلَابِيب jalābīb [pl. of n. جِلْبَاب jilbāb] either an outer garment covering the whole body or a large veil covering the head down to the waist (33:59) يُدْنِينَ عَلَيْهِنَّ مِنْ جَلَابِيبِهِنَّ to draw their garments over them.
